headline: Visa’s Stablecoin Push Tests Future Of Global Card And Fee Flows
summary: Visa is expanding stablecoin backed card programs globally, now covering more than 100 countries in partnership with Stripe and Bridge. The company is piloting on chain settlement for some transactions, using blockchain rails alongside traditional payment infrastructure. Visa is broadening its cross border reach through acquisitions such as Prisma Medios de Pago and integrations with UnionPay. New collaborations with AWS aim to support agentic commerce tools and next generation digital...
